title: Analyst output (one area, one lens)
description: Produced by each parallel analyst: first-time-user stories + lens-grounded findings + renderable solution ideas for a single surface area under a single design lens.

area.description: The surface area audited, e.g. 'Onboarding, Auth & First-Run'.

lensesApplied.description: The design lens(es) applied in this analysis. One element for area-x-lens fan-out; several for area-all-lenses. Each finding also carries its own per-finding lens.

summary.description: 3-5 sentence verdict on this area for a first-timer, voiced in the chosen lens.

persona.description: Persona key/label from config, e.g. 'solo self-hoster'.

story.description: As a <persona>, I want <goal>, so that <benefit>.

firstRunMoment.description: The concrete first-time moment this story happens in (cite a screen).

friction.description: What actually goes wrong or feels off today.

id.description: Short slug unique within this area, e.g. 'onboarding-email-deadend'.

where.description: Screen filename and/or code file:line — the grounding evidence.

principle.description: The named principle/heuristic/criterion this maps to, e.g. 'H1 Visibility of status', 'P6 Honest', 'WCAG 1.4.3'. May be '—' for the Jobs lens.

verdict.description: One crisp line voiced in the lens (the 'Jobs would say…' equivalent).

observation.description: Specific and concrete. Cite the screen/code. Distinguish real UI issues from dev-mock artifacts.

isCodeBug.description: True if this is a claimed source-code defect that MUST be verified at file:line before reporting.

keyChanges.description: Concrete, renderable changes (layout, copy, color, component) so a designer could mock it.
